messages.content: 帮我生成这个表的latex代码

```latex
% Requires: \usepackage{booktabs}
\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\begin{tabular}{lccc}
\toprule
Method & $\mathrm{NFE}_{\pi_{\theta_{\text{old}}}}$ & $\mathrm{NFE}_{\pi_{\theta}}$ & Iteration Time (s)$\downarrow$ \\
\midrule
FLUX & / & / & / \\
\midrule
\multirow{3}{*}{DanceGRPO} & 25 & 14  & 291.284 \\
                         & 25 & 4   & 149.978 \\
                         & 25 & $4^{*}$ & 150.059 \\
\midrule
MixGRPO & 25 & 4 & 150.839 \\
\midrule
\multirow{2}{*}{MixGRPO-Flash} & 16 (Avg) & 4      & \underline{112.372} \\
                              & 8        & $4^{*}$ & \textbf{83.278} \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table}
```

> 注：若你使用了 `\multirow`，还需要在导言区加：`\usepackage{multirow}`。
